backpressure._comment_enabled: Options: true, false - Enable backpressure command execution and retry logic
backpressure._comment_commands: List of PowerShell commands to run for backpressure validation
backpressure._comment_max_retries: Number of retry attempts before marking requirement as blocked

validation._comment_mark_blocked: Options: true, false - Mark requirement as blocked when validation fails
validation._comment_exit_on_blocked: Options: true, false - Exit agent when requirement is marked blocked
validation._comment_max_validation_retries: Number of validation retry attempts before marking requirement as blocked
